pillars.title: Operational Efficiency
pillars.summary: Continuous monitoring and optimisation of node energy, throughput, and hardware utilisation with threshold-based governance alerts.

pillars.title: Impact Transparency
pillars.summary: Public reporting of sustainability metrics, waste reductions, and resource resets aligned to v3.0 disclosure standards.

pillars.title: Green Infrastructure Planning
pillars.summary: Regional renewable-energy preference mapping and low-power service mesh design for civic workloads.

pillars.title: Waste Reduction
pillars.summary: Systemic reduction of operational waste across node maintenance, documentation, and civic logistics.

pillars.title: Sustainable Deployment
pillars.summary: Build and release pipelines optimised for minimal rebuilds, smaller artifacts, and greener hosting choices.

pillars.title: Circular Economy Integration
pillars.summary: Closed-loop material flows for hardware, packaging, and consumables across all civic operations.

operations.title: Node Efficiency Monitoring
operations.summary: Continuous monitoring of node energy, throughput, and hardware utilization with threshold-based alerts.

operations.title: Sustainable Deployment Pipeline
operations.summary: Build and release pipelines optimized for minimal rebuilds, smaller artifacts, and greener hosting choices.

operations.title: Workload Scheduling Optimisation
operations.summary: Schedule civic workloads to align with renewable-energy availability windows.

operations.title: Real-Time PUE Dashboard
operations.summary: Live Power Usage Effectiveness metrics across all 24 edge locations with anomaly alerting.

operations.title: Carbon-Aware Autoscaling
operations.summary: Kubernetes scheduler plugin preferring nodes with surplus renewable energy for batch workloads.

operations.title: Thermal Energy Recovery
operations.summary: Capture and reuse of waste heat from node operations for district heating and facility climate control.

operations.title: Green CI/CD Artefact Optimisation
operations.summary: Dependency pruning, layer caching, and multi-arch builds reducing container image sizes by 40%.

impact.title: Annual Impact Report 2025
impact.summary: Aggregates operational efficiency changes, waste reductions, and green protocol adoption metrics across services.

impact.title: Q2 2026 Efficiency Snapshot
impact.summary: Midyear snapshot of node efficiency deltas and green protocol adoption progress.

impact.title: Waste Reduction Progress Report
impact.summary: 23% reduction in operational waste through hardware lifecycle extension and zero-waste sprints.

impact.title: Renewable Energy Milestone Report
impact.summary: 67% renewable energy across node operations, on track for 80% target by 2027.

impact.title: Carbon Intensity Trend Analysis
impact.summary: Year-over-year carbon intensity reduction from 198 to 145 gCO2eq/kWh across all civic infrastructure.

impact.title: Circular Economy Baseline Assessment
impact.summary: Material flow analysis identifying closure opportunities for hardware, packaging, and consumable streams.

greenInfrastructure.title: Regional Green Node Pools
greenInfrastructure.summary: Preference map for renewable-energy-first regions, with deployment scheduling tied to availability and policy thresholds.

greenInfrastructure.title: Low-Power Service Mesh
greenInfrastructure.summary: Service mesh design targeting reduced idle power draw and adaptive scaling for civic workloads with variable demand.

greenInfrastructure.title: Edge Energy-Aware Routing
greenInfrastructure.summary: Routing layer that shifts traffic toward nodes with surplus renewable energy.

greenInfrastructure.title: Solar-Powered Edge Nodes
greenInfrastructure.summary: 12 edge locations with on-site solar generation covering 40-60% of daytime load.

greenInfrastructure.title: Green Data Centre Retrofit
greenInfrastructure.summary: Liquid cooling upgrade and airflow optimisation reducing PUE from 1.45 to 1.28 at primary facility.

greenInfrastructure.title: Battery Storage Integration
greenInfrastructure.summary: Grid-scale battery deployment for renewable energy time-shifting and backup power at 6 edge sites.
